$comment: Resolved mapping for the /pull-new-designs skill (Step 0). Each upstream Claude Design project maps to its committed sync baseline + the app destinations a run reconciles into, so re-runs resolve deterministically instead of re-guessing. 'styling' is this repo's component styling convention; 'namespace' is the design-system bundle namespace used to detect baselines by content, not folder name.

policy.note: Apply an upstream removal (delete the primitive/token locally) when syncing from a COMPLETE design-system import — a kind=design-system project verified complete against its _ds_manifest, where absence reliably means 'removed', so mirror it. From a product/prototype export (a partial slice), NEVER infer removal: absence only means 'not used by these prototypes'. Either way, surface what changed in the report.

wabi-sabi-foundation.note: No standalone foundation export yet — the foundation is bundled in the pr-controller-prototypes export, so its baseline IS that export's _ds/. Don't copy it into a separate dir (duplicates + drifts on the next product sync). A standalone foundation import would give it its own design/.upstream/wabi-sabi-foundation/ baseline.
